description_long: This shotgun features a long, dual-barrel design with a predominantly gray and black color scheme, accented by blue and green highlights. The barrels are parallel and appear to have venting holes along the top, suggesting a side-by-side configuration. The receiver is angular and robust, with a blue top plate and a small green detail near the rear. A cylindrical component, likely a drum or wheel, is attached below the receiver, possibly for ammunition or as a design element. The stock is minimalistic, with no traditional shoulder rest, and the grip area is integrated into the main body. The overall construction appears to be metallic, with a hard, smooth finish and a modern, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A modern, dual-barrel shotgun with a gray, black, and blue color scheme, featuring a minimal stock and a cylindrical component below the receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dual barrels, the blue receiver top, and the cylindrical component below.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the barrel venting and the cylindrical component.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the minimal stock, with the barrels extending forward.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with visible venting holes along the top of the barrels
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rectangular trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
